name: io.github.lanternrow/youtube-organic-mcp
description: YouTube organic analytics — channel stats, video performance, watch time & audience insights.

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID for the YouTube Data + Analytics APIs
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth refresh token (offline access) for the channel owner
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN
